summary.validation_reason: At least 70% of nodes and edges matched

node_matches.description_1: UE is in 5GMM-DEREGISTERED state, not registered with the network. Type: state
node_matches.description_2: UE is in 5GMM-DEREGISTERED state, not registered with the network. Type: state

node_matches.description_1: UE has received a REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is preparing to send the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message. Type: state
node_matches.description_2: UE has received REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is preparing/sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE. Type: state

node_matches.description_1: UE received a REGISTRATION REJECT with a cause requiring PLMN/SNPN reselection. Type: state
node_matches.description_2: UE received REGISTRATION REJECT with a cause requiring PLMN/SNPN selection and is performing the selection process. Type: state

node_matches.description_1: UE is waiting for timer T3511 to expire after a T3510 timeout before retrying registration (attempt < 5). Type: state
node_matches.description_2: UE experienced T3510 timeout (retries < 5) and is waiting for T3511 timer to expire before retrying registration. Type: state

node_matches.description_1: AMF is idle, not processing any registration procedure for this UE. Type: state
node_matches.description_2: AMF is idle with respect to this UE's registration procedure. Type: state

node_matches.description_1: AMF has received the REGISTRATION REQUEST and is processing it (e.g., context retrieval, initiating common procedures). Type: state
node_matches.description_2: AMF has received REGISTRATION REQUEST and is processing it, potentially initiating common procedures. Type: state

node_matches.description_1: AMF is performing authentication or security mode control procedures with the UE. Type: state
node_matches.description_2: AMF is performing authentication and/or security procedures with the UE. Type: state

node_matches.description_1: AMF has sent REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is waiting for the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE (timer T3550 running). Type: state
node_matches.description_2: AMF has sent REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE (timer T3550 running). Type: state

node_matches.description_1: AMF considers the UE successfully registered (either after receiving REGISTRATION COMPLETE or sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT not requiring completion). Type: state
node_matches.description_2: AMF considers the UE successfully registered (5GMM-REGISTERED state). Type: state

node_matches.description_1: A REGISTRATION REQUEST message is sent by the UE or received by the AMF. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: REGISTRATION REQUEST message is sent by UE or received by AMF. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: An AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message is sent by the AMF or received by the UE. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message is sent by AMF or received by UE. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: A SECURITY MODE COMMAND message is sent by the AMF or received by the UE. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: SECURITY MODE COMMAND message is sent by AMF or received by UE. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: An AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message is sent by the UE or received by the AMF. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message is sent by UE or received by AMF. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: A SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message is sent by the UE or received by the AMF. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message is sent by UE or received by AMF. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: A REGISTRATION ACCEPT message requiring a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response is sent by the AMF or received by the UE. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: REGISTRATION ACCEPT message requiring REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment is sent by AMF or received by UE. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: A REGISTRATION ACCEPT message not requiring a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response is sent by the AMF or received by the UE. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: REGISTRATION ACCEPT message not requiring REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment is sent by AMF or received by UE. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: A REGISTRATION REJECT message is sent by the AMF or received by the UE. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: REGISTRATION REJECT message is sent by AMF or received by UE. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: A REGISTRATION COMPLETE message is sent by the UE or received by the AMF. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: REGISTRATION COMPLETE message is sent by UE or received by AMF. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: Timer T3510 expires at the UE, and the registration attempt counter is less than 5. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: Timer T3510 expires at UE, and registration attempt counter is less than 5. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: Timer T3510 expires at the UE, and the registration attempt counter is equal to 5. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: Timer T3510 expires at UE, and registration attempt counter is equal to 5. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: Timer T3511 expires at the UE. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: Timer T3511 expires at UE. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: Timer T3346 expires at the UE. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: Timer T3346 expires at UE. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: The UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: Timer T3550 expires at the AMF for the fifth time (max retransmissions). Type: event
node_matches.description_2: Timer T3550 expires at AMF for the 5th time. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: An abnormal case occurs at the UE side during registration (e.g., lower layer failure, transmission failure). Type: event
node_matches.description_2: An abnormal case occurs at the UE (e.g., lower layer failure, access barring, transmission failure). Type: event

node_matches.description_1: The UE's current TAI changes and is no longer in the TAI list received in REGISTRATION ACCEPT, potentially during a failure. Type: event
node_matches.description_2: UE detects TAI change after REGISTRATION COMPLETE transmission failure, and new TAI is not in the list. Type: event

node_matches.description_1: An abnormal case occurs at the AMF side during registration (e.g., lower layer failure while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE). Type: event
node_matches.description_2: An abnormal case occurs at the AMF (e.g., lower layer failure). Type: event

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the UE in 5GMM-DEREGISTERED state initiates initial registration by sending a REGISTRATION REQUEST message (Subclause 5.5.1.2.2). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the UE in state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED initiates the initial registration procedure by sending a REGISTRATION REQUEST message (e.g., for 5GS services, emergency, SMS, mobility from GERAN/UTRAN, onboarding, disaster roaming, resuming service). Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE transitions to attempting registration after sending the REGISTRATION REQUEST and starting timer T3510 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.2). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE transitions to attempting registration after sending the REGISTRATION REQUEST and starting timer T3510. Timers T3502 and T3511 are stopped if running. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the AMF receives a REGISTRATION REQUEST message from the UE. Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION REQUEST message from the UE. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: AMF transitions to processing the registration upon receiving the REGISTRATION REQUEST. Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: AMF transitions to processing the request upon receiving the REGISTRATION REQUEST message. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the AMF initiates 5GMM common procedures like authentication and security based on the REGISTRATION REQUEST (Subclause 5.5.1.2.3). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: AMF initiates 5GMM common procedures (e.g., authentication, security) based on information in the REGISTRATION REQUEST. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the AMF sends an AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message to the UE as part of the authentication procedure (Subclause 5.5.1.2.3). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the AMF sends an AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message to the UE as part of the authentication procedure. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE transitions to handle authentication/security upon receiving the AUTHENTICATION REQUEST. Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE transitions to authenticating/securing state upon receiving the AUTHENTICATION REQUEST from the AMF. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: UE transitions to handle authentication/security upon receiving the SECURITY MODE COMMAND. Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE transitions to authenticating/securing state upon receiving the SECURITY MODE COMMAND from the AMF. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the UE sends an AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message to the AMF. Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the UE sends an AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message to the AMF. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE returns to attempting registration after sending the AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE, awaiting further network action. Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE returns to waiting state (attempting registration) after sending the AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the UE sends a SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message to the AMF. Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the UE sends a SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message to the AMF. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE returns to attempting registration after sending the SECURITY MODE COMPLETE, awaiting further network action. Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE returns to waiting state (attempting registration) after sending the SECURITY MODE COMPLETE. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: AMF transitions to waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring completion, starting timer T3550 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: AMF transitions to waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT (requiring complete) and starts timer T3550. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT not requiring a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does *not* require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: AMF transitions to registered state after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT that does not require completion. Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: AMF transitions directly to registered state after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT (not requiring complete). Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the AMF rejects the registration request and sends a REGISTRATION REJECT message (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the AMF rejects the registration request and sends a REGISTRATION REJECT message. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: AMF returns to idle state after sending REGISTRATION REJECT. Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: AMF returns to idle state regarding this UE's registration attempt after sending the REGISTRATION REJECT message. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does not require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does *not* require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION REJECT message from the AMF (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION REJECT message from the AMF. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE returns to deregistered state to potentially re-initiate registration after T3346 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5, Cause #22). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE transitions back to deregistered state upon T3346 expiry, allowing potential re-attempt of registration if still needed. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process according to 3GPP TS 23.122 [5]. Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process according to 3GPP TS 23.122. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE returns to deregistered state on the newly selected PLMN/SNPN, ready to initiate registration. Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE transitions to deregistered state (potentially on a newly selected PLMN/SNPN or remaining in limited service) after completing PLMN/SNPN selection, ready to initiate registration if a suitable cell is found. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the UE sends the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the UE sends the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE transitions to 5GMM-REGISTERED state after sending the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message. Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) after successfully sending the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: AMF transitions to 5GMM-REGISTERED state upon receiving the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message, stopping timer T3550 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: AMF stops timer T3550 and transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) upon receiving the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when timer T3511 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when timer T3511 expires. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE returns to deregistered state to restart registration after T3511 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE transitions back to deregistered state upon T3511 expiry to re-attempt registration if still required. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered when timer T3502 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered when timer T3502 expires (or if its value was initially zero). Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE returns to deregistered state (potentially initiating PLMN search) after T3502 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE performs actions defined for T3502 expiry (potentially PLMN selection) and remains in a deregistered state. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered by various UE-side failures like lower layer issues, transmission failures, or other abnormal cases during the attempt (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 cases e, k, n). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered by various UE-internal or lower-layer failures during the registration attempt. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE transitions back to a deregistered state following a failure during the registration attempt, potentially after incrementing attempt counter (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 cases c, d, e). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE aborts the registration procedure and transitions to a deregistered state (potentially LIMITED-SERVICE or PLMN-SEARCH) following a UE-internal or lower-layer failure. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered by transmission failure of the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case j). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered by transmission failure of the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message indicated by lower layers. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: UE may return to the state of sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE to retry transmission after failure (implementation specific) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case j). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE attempts to resend REGISTRATION COMPLETE after a transmission failure. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: UE aborts initial registration and transitions towards deregistered state to initiate mobility registration update due to TAI change during REG COMPLETE failure (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case i). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: UE aborts initial registration procedure and initiates mobility registration update due to TAI change after REGISTRATION COMPLETE transmission failure. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: AMF retransmits REGISTRATION ACCEPT, restarts T3550, and remains in the waiting state (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case c). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: AMF retransmits REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, resets and restarts timer T3550, and returns to waiting state. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: AMF aborts waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE and transitions to registered state after T3550 max timeouts (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case c). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: AMF aborts the registration procedure and transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) after T3550 max timeouts. Type: condition

edge_matches.description_1: Triggered by AMF-side failures (e.g., lower layer failure) while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case a). Type: trigger
edge_matches.description_2: Triggered by a lower layer failure at the AMF while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE. Type: trigger

edge_matches.description_1: AMF aborts waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE and transitions to registered state following a failure (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case a). Type: condition
edge_matches.description_2: AMF locally aborts the registration procedure and transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) following a lower layer failure. Type: condition

unmatched_nodes.description: UE has sent a REGISTRATION REQUEST for initial registration and is waiting for a response or performing common procedures (e.g., authentication, security). Type: state
UE is actively involved in authentication or security mode control procedures initiated by the AMF. Type: state
UE has successfully completed the initial registration procedure and is in 5GMM-REGISTERED state. Type: state
UE received a REGISTRATION REJECT with a cause requiring a backoff period (T3346) before retrying registration. Type: state
UE is waiting for timer T3502 to expire after reaching the maximum number of registration attempts (T3510 timeout, attempt = 5). Type: state
Timer T3502 expires at the UE. Type: event
Timer T3550 expires at the AMF, and the retransmission counter is less than 4. Type: event

unmatched_edges.description: Triggered when the AMF sends a SECURITY MODE COMMAND message to the UE as part of the security procedure (Subclause 5.5.1.2.3). Type: trigger

Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response (e.g., due to GUTI reallocation, SOR, ODB, CAG list update, PEIPS, UE Radio Cap ID, Truncated S-TMSI config, UUAA pending, NSSAI update, NSAG info, Alternative NSSAI, On-demand NSSAI) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: trigger

Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that requires a REGISTRATION COMPLETE response (e.g., due to GUTI, SOR, ODB, CAG list, PEIPS, UE Radio Cap ID, Truncated S-TMSI config, UUAA pending, NSSAI update, NSAG info, Alternative NSSAI, On-demand NSSAI) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: trigger
UE transitions to sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE upon receiving a REGISTRATION ACCEPT that requires completion (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: condition
UE transitions to 5GMM-REGISTERED state upon receiving a REGISTRATION ACCEPT that does not require completion (Subclause 5.5.1.2.4). Type: condition
UE transitions to retry state upon receiving REGISTRATION REJECT with 5GMM cause #22 (Congestion) and a valid T3346 value (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5). Type: condition

UE transitions to PLMN search state upon receiving REGISTRATION REJECT with specific causes requiring PLMN/SNPN reselection (e.g., #11, #73, #74, #75, #76, #78, #80) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5). Type: condition

UE transitions to a deregistered sub-state (e.g., DEREGISTERED.NO-SUPI, DEREGISTERED.LIMITED-SERVICE, DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION) upon receiving REGISTRATION REJECT with causes not leading to immediate retry or PLMN search (e.g., #3, #6, #7, #10, #12, #13, #15, #27, #31, #62, #72, #77, #79, #81, #82) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5). Type: condition
Triggered when the backoff timer T3346 expires (Subclause 5.5.1.2.5, Cause #22). Type: trigger
Triggered upon T3510 timeout when the registration attempt counter is less than 5 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c). Type: trigger
UE transitions to waiting for T3511 after T3510 timeout (retry case), starting timer T3511 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c). Type: condition
Triggered upon T3510 timeout when the registration attempt counter reaches 5 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c). Type: trigger
UE transitions to waiting for T3502 after T3510 timeout (max attempts reached), starting timer T3502 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case c). Type: condition
Condition where failure to send REGISTRATION COMPLETE coincides with TAI changing out of the assigned list (Subclause 5.5.1.2.7 case i). Type: condition
Triggered upon T3550 timeout when the retransmission counter is less than 4 (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case c). Type: trigger
Triggered upon the fifth expiry of timer T3550 (max retransmissions reached) (Subclause 5.5.1.2.8 case c). Type: trigger
